# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No correctness or safety issues were identified in the current change set. The working-tree diff only touches `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json`, so no new runtime code changes were reviewed in this patch for `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, or `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`.

## Amendments

None.
